headline: Soaak Technologies and Garmin Health Optimize Human Performance
summary: Soaak Technologies, developer of the award-winning human performance app, announces its approval as an official Garmin Health partner with direct API integration into Garmin fitness and health-tracking products. The partnership marks a major milestone in Soaak's expanding wearable ecosystem and opens access to one of the world's most widely used fitness and health-tracking platforms.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Garmin, Lowers Price Target to $238
summary: Barclays  analyst Tim Long   maintains Garmin (NYSE:GRMN) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $240 to $238.

headline: Garmin Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Garmin (NYSE:GRMN) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management described as a continuation of long-term positive trends, highlighted by a record first-quarter revenue performance and margin expansion. headline: Garmin Ltd (GRMN) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strong Fitness Segment Growth
summary: Garmin Ltd (GRMN) reports a 14% revenue increase to $1.75 billion, driven by a 42% surge in the Fitness segment, despite challenges in the Outdoor and Auto OEM segments.

headline: Garmin: A Strong Q1 To Start The Year But There Could Be Back-Half Headwinds
summary: Garmin delivered record Q1 revenues of $1.75B and EPS of $2.08, beating consensus. Learn why GRMN stock is a Hold.
